title: pimpinella nephrophylla
intro: Pimpinella nephrophylla, also known as Burn Plantain or Marsh Celery, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Pimpinella nephrophylla include its ability to help reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Pimpinella nephrophylla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
